strings.settings.title: Ngā Tautuhinga
strings.settings.subtitle: Ngā Whakaahuatanga o te Tono
strings.lang.title: Reo
strings.lang.intro: Kua tūnohia ngā reo matua. Tikiake tōu reo mō ngā whakamāoritanga katoa ā-ipurangi-kore — ngā whakaahuatanga, ngā pakiwaitara me ērā atu.
strings.lang.failed: I rahua te tikiake. Tirohia tō hononga, ka whakamātau anō.
strings.settings.units.desc: Me pēhea te whakaatu i ngā tawhiti.
strings.settings.night.desc: Ko te whero hōhonu ka tiaki i ngā kamo kua rērētia ki te pōuriuri — he iti ake te pānga o te whero ki te kite pō, ā ka tū tonu te rangi e tiaho ana.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: Ka whero aunoa i ngā wā o te pō ka pouri te rangi.
strings.settings.location.desc: Ko tēhea wāhi ka tatau ai te rangi.
strings.settings.haptics.desc: Ooriori ina rakaina ki te whāinga.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Ka pānuitia te whāinga me ngā aratohu ā-reo — mō te whakamahi ā-ringa-kore me ngā kaimātakitaki.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Tautuhia māmā kia hāngai ai ngā rārangi aho whetu me ngā ara amiorangi ki te rangi tūturu.
strings.settings.about.credits: I hangaia ki te astronomy-engine, satellite.js me Celestrak.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.paywall.title: Wetekia te Rangi Katoa
strings.paywall.subtitle: He hoko kotahi. Kāore he ohaurunga, kāore he pūkete — nōu ake mō ake tonu, katoa ā-ipurangi-kore.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Ngā whetu, aho whetu me ngā amiorangi katoa
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Miihini Wā — titiro ki te rangi i tēhea rā
strings.paywall.feature.events: Ngā mahi rangi — porāhura, ua whetu, whakakotahi
strings.paywall.comingSoon: Ka tuwhera ngā hoko ākuanei — whakamahia he waehere wetekanga ināianei.
strings.paywall.error: He raru kei roto. Whakamātauria anō.
strings.paywall.restoreNone: Kāore i kitea he hoko o mua.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Tīpakohia he whāinga hei rapu i te rangi
strings.stars.title: Ngā Whetu
strings.stars.subtitle: Ngā whetu ingoa {n} ngā mea tino tiaho
strings.deepsky.title: Te Rangi Hōhonu
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Ngā whetu, kohu ao, kāhui whetu me ngā kopua {n}
strings.constellations.title: Ngā Aho Whetu
strings.constellations.subtitle: Ngā āhua whetu {n} rongonui
strings.satellites.title: Ngā Amiorangi
strings.events.title: Ngā Mahi Rangi
strings.events.subtitle: He aha ka haere mai — Pāwhiritia hei haerenga wā
strings.events.calculating: E tatau ana i ngā mahi e heke mai ana…
strings.search.name: Rapua mā te ingoa…
strings.list.gettingLocation: E kimi ana i tōu wāhi…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: Kāore anō he mea pai — Tuwhera he mea, pāwhiritia ★ hei tāpiri.
strings.list.empty.visible: Kāore he mea i runga ake i te pae ināianei — Whakamātauria "Whakakitea katoa".
strings.list.empty.search: Kāore he mea e hāngai ana ki tōu rapunga.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: Kāore ngā whetu kua rārangi i runga ake i te pae ināianei.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: Kāore ngā mea rangi hōhonu i runga ake i te pae ināianei.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: Kāore ēnei aho whetu i runga ake i te pae ināianei.
strings.sat.overhead: ● Ka kitea ināianei — Titiro ki runga!
strings.sat.overheadDay: E tū ana ki runga ināianei engari he awatea
strings.sat.overheadShadow: E tū ana ki runga ināianei engari kei te ātea o Papatūānuku
strings.sat.noPass: Kāore he haerenga e kitea ana ā tōna wā
strings.fav.empty:
Kāore anō he mea pai.
Tuwhera i tēhea ao, whetu rānei, pāwhiritia ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: Kāore ōu mea pai i runga ake i te pae ināianei.
strings.fav.noMatch: Kāore he mea pai e hāngai ana ki tōu rapunga.
strings.point.aboveHorizon: ● I runga ake i te pae
strings.point.belowHorizon: ○ I raro ake i te pae
strings.point.belowBanner: Kei raro i te pae {name} — Tūhia mā raro i Papatūānuku.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: Kāore {name} i runga ināianei — Pāwhiritia mōhiohio mō te haerenga e whai ake.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Haerenga Wā: {when} — Pāwhiria hei hoki ki ināianei
strings.point.permBody: Ka whakaatu a Planet Pointer i tētahi pere ārahina i runga i te ataata kāmera ora hei tohu i {name}.
strings.info.aboveHorizon: I runga ake i te pae
strings.info.belowHorizon: I raro ake i te pae
strings.info.favorited: ★  I roto i ngā mea pai
strings.info.passNote: Wā-ā-rohe. Ko te paenga teitei = kanapa, ngāwari te haerenga.
strings.ev.lunarSub: Ka haere te Marama mā roto i te ātea o Papatūānuku
strings.ev.solarSub: Ka haere te Marama i mua i te Rā
strings.ev.iss: Ka haere te ISS i runga ake
strings.time.title: Miihini Wā
strings.time.subtitle: Titiro ki te rangi i tēhea rā, wā rānei.
